title: Add AI Models Laboratory to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Welcome to the Laboratory
gist.blurb: The AI Models Laboratory has sprouted in our community greenhouse! It's a slick Next.js and Three.js app for generating and archiving high-res digital artifacts in real-time.
gist.summary: Added the AI Models Laboratory, a Next.js and Three.js web app for real-time generative creation, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore this new tool for creating and archiving high-resolution digital artifacts.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy greenhouse laboratory hybrid. Polly the bee wearing tiny safety goggles inspecting floating 3D geometric shapes (representing Three.js digital artifacts) alongside the Monitor Robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny safety goggles, hovering inside a lush greenhouse laboratory. She is inspecting a glowing, floating 3D geometric artifact alongside a chunky Monitor Robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny safety goggles, hovering inside a lush greenhouse laboratory. She is inspecting a glowing, floating 3D geometric artifact alongside a chunky Monitor Robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
